engineGuide.h2: Nissan NV350 Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan NV350 across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.5L Diesel
entries.history: The YD25DDTi common-rail diesel powered most NV350 vans, delivering strong torque but suffering timing chain tensioner design flaws per Nissan TB NTB15-078.
compatibleVariants: NV350 Van, NV350 Wide Body, NV350 Super Long, NV350 Microbus, NV350 Impendulo Taxi, NV350 5AT, NV350 6MT
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure (TB NTB15-078) at 60k-100k miles
EGR valve carbon buildup causing rough idle and stalling
DPF clogging leading to power loss and potential write-off
entries.cta: Get quotes for YD25DDTi Nissan NV350 engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Diesel (Turbo)
entries.history: Earlier turbo variant of YD25 family, less common in UK NV350 but shares core failure patterns with DDTi units.
commonFailures: Turbocharger oil seal leaks under high mileage
Injector failure in common rail system
Compression loss after injector/EGR repairs fail
entries.cta: Get quotes for YD25DET Nissan NV350 engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: The QR25DE petrol engine offered ULEZ-compliant alternative for NV350 fleets, with simpler emissions but higher fuel consumption than diesel.
compatibleVariants: NV350 Van, NV350 Wide Body, NV350 Impendulo Taxi, NV350 Microbus (petrol spec)
commonFailures: Piston ring land wear after 90k miles causing oil consumption
Timing chain stretch on high-mileage units
VVT solenoid issues causing rattle on cold start
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR25DE Nissan NV350 engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Base petrol engine for entry-level NV350 variants, lower power but adequate for urban fleet use with ULEZ compliance.
compatibleVariants: NV350 Van (base trim), NV350 Microbus (petrol base)
commonFailures: Oil consumption due to piston ring design
MAF sensor failures affecting fuel economy
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE Nissan NV350 engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Nissan NV350 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan NV350's YD25DDTi diesel dominates UK replacement enquiries due to timing chain tensioner failures documented in Nissan Technical Bulletin NTB15-078. QR25DE petrol units face piston ring wear. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: YD25DDTi Timing Chain Stretch - Why NV350 Diesel Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NV350 Van, Wide Body, Microbus (2012-2025, YD25DDTi)
problems.rootCause: OEM timing chain tensioner design flaw (TB NTB15-078) allows oil pressure loss, causing chain stretch and potential catastrophic engine damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain, tensioner 13062-EB60A, guides, seals
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before compression loss; prevents catastrophic failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head removal, valve inspection, EGR/injector service
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses secondary damage; not viable if block compression lost

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with updated tensioner, upgraded components, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only solution once compression loss occurs; restores full reliability

problems.recommendation: On a Nissan NV350 worth £8,000-£15,000, preventative timing chain replacement at 60k miles offers better value than waiting for failure. If you hear chain rattle on cold start, get quotes immediately - compression loss means full replacement is the only option.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt YD25DDTi engine prices for your Nissan NV350

problems.h4: EGR Valve Carbon Buildup - Why NV350 Diesels Stall at Idle
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NV350 all diesel variants (2012-2025, YD25DDTi)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valve clogs with carbon deposits, restricting airflow and causing rough idle, stalling, and poor cold starting.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace EGR valve 14710-EB60A, reset ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught early; carbon may return without DPF health

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Clean intake manifold, EGR cooler, throttle body, update ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses widespread carbon; suitable for high-mileage vans

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit if EGR damage caused compression loss
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if cylinder compression tested and failed after EGR repair

problems.recommendation: EGR-related stalling is usually fixable without engine replacement. However, if compression testing shows low cylinder pressure after EGR service, the damage is done - a rebuilt YD25DDTi with updated components is the reliable solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Nissan NV350 EGR-related engine replacement

problems.h4: DPF Clogging & Regeneration Failure - When NV350 Diesels Get Written Off
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NV350 diesel variants with DPF (2014-2025, YD25DDTi)
problems.rootCause: Diesel particulate filter clogs when short journeys prevent active regeneration; excessive backpressure damages turbo and causes power loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Chemical clean or forced regeneration cycle via diagnostic tool
repairOptions.longevity: Works if DPF not physically damaged; requires motorway driving afterwards

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace DPF assembly, sensors, reset ECU adaptation values
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if engine otherwise healthy; costly but avoids full replacement

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit if DPF failure caused turbo/engine damage
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary when backpressure has damaged turbo or caused compression loss

problems.recommendation: DPF warnings should never be ignored. If your NV350 shows persistent DPF light with power loss, get a compression test immediately. If compression is good, DPF replacement may save the engine. If compression is low, a rebuilt YD25DDTi is the only reliable path forward.
problems.cta: Compare Nissan NV350 DPF-related engine replacement prices

problems.h4: Compression Loss After Injector/EGR Repairs - The Point of No Return
problems.rootCause: Failed injectors or severe EGR carbon cause uneven combustion, washing cylinder walls with fuel or restricting airflow, leading to piston ring wear and permanent compression loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty common rail injectors 16600-EC00A, code to ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if compression test passes; often fails to resolve underlying damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with upgraded pistons, rings, updated tensioner, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: The only solution once compression loss is confirmed; restores full reliability

problems.recommendation: If you've spent money on injectors or EGR repairs and the NV350 still has poor starting, smoke, or low power, demand a compression test. If results show low pressure, further repairs are throwing good money after bad - a rebuilt engine with upgraded internals is the cost-effective, reliable solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for compression-loss Nissan NV350 engine replacement

problems.h4: Turbocharger Oil Starvation - Why NV350 Diesels Lose Boost
problems.rootCause: Oil starvation from clogged feed lines, worn oil pump, or delayed oil changes causes turbo bearing failure, leading to smoke, noise, and potential debris entering the engine.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace turbocharger 14411-EC00A, clean oil lines, reset adaptations
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if engine compression is good and no debris entered cylinders

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Engine with Turbo
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit including new/reconditioned turbo, upgraded components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary if turbo debris damaged cylinders or compression is compromised

problems.recommendation: Turbo failure on a YD25DDTi demands immediate compression testing. If compression is good, a quality turbo replacement may suffice. If compression is low or metallic debris is found in the oil, only a rebuilt engine prevents repeat failure.
problems.cta: Compare Nissan NV350 turbo-related engine replacement costs

problems.h4: Poor Cold Starting & Idle Vibration - Glow Plug vs Compression Issues
problems.rootCause: Failed glow plugs cause hard cold starts; if vibration persists after glow plug replacement, low compression from ring wear is the likely culprit.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all four glow plugs, test circuit, reset ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for cold-start issues only; does not address compression loss

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Professional compression test, leak-down test, diagnostic scan
repairOptions.longevity: Essential step to determine if vibration is glow plug vs compression related

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit if compression test confirms cylinder wear
repairOptions.longevity: Only solution when low compression is confirmed; restores reliable cold starting

problems.recommendation: Don't ignore persistent cold-start vibration. If new glow plugs don't resolve it, insist on a compression test. If compression is low, further electrical diagnostics waste money - a rebuilt YD25DDTi is the reliable, warranty-backed solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Nissan NV350 cold-start engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan NV350
finalCta.paragraph: The Nissan NV350's commercial role means downtime costs money. EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK specialists offering rebuilt YD25DDTi, QR25DE and QR20DE engines with upgraded components addressing known failure points. Every unit includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices today and get your NV350 back on the road within 3-4 days - without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan NV350 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan NV350 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

timing chain stretch on high mileage

items.descriptor: The YD25DDTi 2.5L common-rail diesel powered most NV350 vans from 2012-2025, dominating UK replacement enquiries due to timing chain tensioner failures documented in Nissan TB NTB15-078.

Timing chain tensioner design flaw requiring preventative attention
EGR/DPF systems prone to carbon buildup on short-journey fleet use

items.descriptor: QR25DE and QR20DE petrol engines offered ULEZ-compliant alternatives for NV350 fleets, with simpler emissions but higher fuel consumption than diesel counterparts.
items.familiesLabel: Common Nissan NV350 Petrol Engine Families
families: QR25DE - primary petrol replacement engine (Van/Impendulo), piston ring wear after 90k miles
QR20DE - base petrol unit, lower power but adequate for urban fleet use
QR25DET - turbo petrol variant, less common in UK NV350 registrations
foundIn: E26 All Years (2012-2025) - QR25DE, QR20DE across Van, Wide Body, Impendulo, Microbus
knownFor: ULEZ compliance without DPF complexity
Higher fuel consumption (12.5L/100km) versus diesel (8.3L/100km)
Piston ring land wear on QR25DE after high mileage
Growing replacement demand as ULEZ zones expand across UK cities

engineYears.h2: Nissan NV350 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Nissan NV350's production timeline from 2012-2025, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: E26 Launch: YD25DDTi Diesel & QR25DE Petrol Debut
years.description: The NV350 E26 launched in June 2012 with the YD25DDTi diesel and QR25DE petrol, establishing the engine lineup that would dominate UK commercial van replacements for a decade.
keyChanges: NV350 E26 generation replaces Caravan E25 in UK commercial van market
YD25DDTi common-rail diesel introduced with 95kW/356Nm output
QR25DE petrol offered as ULEZ-compliant alternative for fleet operators
knownFor: YD25DDTi timing chain tensioner design flaw documented in TB NTB15-078
Strong commercial uptake for fleet and conversion specialists
Early units show EGR carbon buildup on short-journey use
QR25DE piston ring wear emerges after 90k miles
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2013 Nissan NV350 replacement engines
years.ticker: NV350 YD25DDTi timing chain rattle • NV350 diesel engine replacement cost • NV350 EGR valve carbon cleaning

years.preview: E26 Matures: Wide Body & Super Long Variants Added
years.description: Mid-cycle NV350 production added Wide Body and Super Long variants, expanding commercial applications while retaining the core YD25DDTi and QR25DE engine families.
keyChanges: Wide Body variant launched December 2012 for UK market
Super Long wheelbase option added for high-capacity conversions
Minor ECU updates to improve DPF regeneration logic on diesel units
Impendulo taxi trim introduced for South African export (UK imports)
knownFor: YD25DDTi timing chain failures accumulate at 60k-100k miles
DPF clogging reports increase on short-journey fleet vehicles
QR25DE oil consumption issues emerge on high-mileage units
Wide Body variants show higher commercial replacement demand
years.cta: Get quotes for 2014-2017 Nissan NV350 replacement engines
years.ticker: NV350 Wide Body engine replacement • NV350 DPF warning light fix • NV350 QR25DE oil consumption repair

years.preview: E26 Facelift: Updated DPF, ECU & Emissions Compliance
years.description: The 2018 NV350 facelift introduced updated DPF systems, revised ECU mapping and stricter emissions compliance, critical for compatibility when sourcing replacement engines.
keyChanges: Facelift styling with revised front grille and lighting
Updated DPF hardware and regeneration strategy on YD25DDTi
Revised ECU software for improved cold-start and idle stability
Continued production through 2025 for UK commercial market
knownFor: Facelift DPF systems require compatible replacement engines
YD25DDTi timing chain risk persists despite ECU updates
Growing petrol replacement demand as ULEZ zones expand
Late-production units show improved reliability with updated components
years.cta: Get quotes for 2018-2025 Nissan NV350 replacement engines
years.ticker: NV350 facelift engine compatibility • NV350 2018+ DPF system replacement • NV350 ULEZ petrol engine swap

faq.h2: Nissan NV350 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Nissan NV350 engine in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt Nissan NV350 YD25DDTi diesel engines typically cost £2,800-£3,200 supply-only in the UK. QR25DE petrol units range £2,400-£2,900. Supply & fit adds £600-£950 labour.
keyPoints: YD25DDTi rebuilt: £2,800-£3,200 supply-only
QR25DE petrol rebuilt: £2,400-£2,900 supply-only
Supply & fit labour adds £600-£950 typically
Prices exclude VAT and depend on variant, mileage, supplier
12-month warranty standard on rebuilt units
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Nissan NV350 engine prices today

items.question: What causes timing chain failure on the Nissan NV350 YD25DDTi engine?
items.answer: Nissan Technical Bulletin NTB15-078 identifies a timing chain tensioner design flaw on YD25DDTi engines, allowing oil pressure loss that causes chain stretch and potential catastrophic damage.
keyPoints: Tensioner part 13062-EB60A prone to oil pressure loss
Failure typically occurs 60,000-100,000 miles
Chain rattle on cold start is the key warning symptom
Compression loss after failure requires full engine replacement
Updated tensioner kits available to prevent recurrence
items.cta: Get quotes for YD25DDTi timing chain repair or replacement

items.question: Is the Nissan NV350 YD25DDTi diesel engine reliable?
items.answer: The YD25DDTi delivers strong torque for commercial use but has documented timing chain, EGR and DPF issues. With preventative maintenance and updated components, reliability improves significantly.
keyPoints: Strong low-end torque (356Nm) ideal for hauling
Timing chain tensioner requires preventative attention per NTB15-078
EGR/DPF systems need regular cleaning on short-journey use
Rebuilt units with updated components offer improved long-term reliability
QR25DE petrol offers ULEZ compliance with simpler emissions
items.cta: Compare reliable rebuilt YD25DDTi engines for your NV350

items.question: Will a Nissan Navara YD25DDTi engine fit my NV350?
items.answer: Yes, the YD25DDTi engine family is shared across Navara D22/D40, Pathfinder and NV350, but ECU programming, transmission compatibility and ancillary fittings must be verified before installation.
keyPoints: Core YD25DDTi block architecture is compatible across models
ECU adaptation and immobiliser coding required post-fitment
Transmission bellhousing and mounts may differ by application
Ancillary components (alternator, AC pump) may need swapping
Always confirm variant-specific compatibility with your supplier
items.cta: Verify donor compatibility for your Nissan NV350 engine replacement

items.question: What causes rough idle and stalling on Nissan NV350 diesel engines?
items.answer: EGR valve carbon buildup is the most common cause of rough idle and stalling on NV350 YD25DDTi engines, restricting airflow and disrupting combustion at low RPM.
keyPoints: EGR valve 14710-EB60A clogs with carbon deposits over time
Symptoms include rough idle, stalling at lights, poor cold starting
Cleaning or replacing the EGR valve often resolves the issue
If compression is low after EGR service, engine replacement may be needed
Regular motorway driving helps reduce carbon buildup
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan NV350 EGR-related engine service or replacement

items.question: When should I replace the timing chain on my Nissan NV350?
items.answer: Nissan TB NTB15-078 doesn't specify a fixed interval, but preventative replacement at 60,000-80,000 miles is recommended for YD25DDTi engines to avoid catastrophic failure.
keyPoints: No fixed service interval; monitor for cold-start chain rattle
Preventative replacement recommended at 60k-80k miles
Use updated tensioner kit 13062-EB60A per technical bulletin
Compression testing advised if chain noise is present
Rebuilt engines include updated timing components as standard
items.cta: Compare preventative timing chain service quotes for your NV350

items.question: How do I find the engine code for my Nissan NV350?
items.answer: The engine code is stamped on the engine block (YD25DDTi, QR25DE, QR20DE) and listed on your V5C registration document under "engine number" or "variant".
keyPoints: Check V5C registration document for engine number/code
Engine code stamped on block near cylinder head
YD25DDTi = diesel, QR25DE/QR20DE = petrol
Enter your reg on EngineMarket to auto-identify your engine
Confirm code with supplier before ordering replacement
items.cta: Instantly identify your Nissan NV350 engine code via registration

items.question: Why does my Nissan NV350 diesel have poor cold starting?
items.answer: Poor cold starting on NV350 YD25DDTi engines is commonly caused by failed glow plugs, but if vibration persists after glow plug replacement, low compression from ring wear is likely.
keyPoints: Failed glow plugs cause hard cold starts; replace all four
If vibration persists, demand a professional compression test
Low compression indicates piston ring wear requiring engine replacement
Injector failure can also cause cold-start issues and smoke
Rebuilt engines include new glow plugs and upgraded rings
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan NV350 cold-start engine diagnosis or replacement

items.question: What warranty comes with reconditioned Nissan NV350 engines?
items.answer: Most UK specialists offer a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty on rebuilt NV350 engines, but timing chain coverage is often excluded per Nissan TB NTB15-078 design limitation.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt units
Timing chain system often excluded due to NTB15-078 design limitation
Confirm warranty terms in writing before accepting quote
Supply & fit warranties typically cover parts and labour
Extended warranty options available for fleet contracts
items.cta: Compare warranty terms on Nissan NV350 engine replacements
